scripts.all-chaski: cp chaski.yaml config.yaml ; npm run all-tasks ; rm config.yaml
scripts.all-gigas: cp gigas.yaml config.yaml ; npm run all-tasks ; rm config.yaml
scripts.all-tasks: npm run clean-all ; npm run ergo && npm run stl
scripts.clean-all: npm run clean-cases ; npm run clean-outlines ; npm run clean-pcbs
scripts.ergo-chaski: cp chaski.yam config.yaml ; npm run ergo ; rm config.yaml
scripts.ergo-gigas: cp gigas.yam config.yaml ; npm run ergo ; rm config.yaml
